betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Exotic Containment: Vacuum Chambers & Containment§f

§aVacuum Chambers form the hull for QMD's high-tier antimatter and synthesis multiblocks.§f
The §bVacuum Chamber§f multiblock family is the largest QMD multiblock class, used to construct the §bExotic Containment Chamber§f, §bNucleosynthesis Chamber§f, and other antimatter-class machines. This quest is gated on obtaining a §bNether Star§f (`minecraft:nether_star`), which signals a major endgame milestone.

§6Vacuum Chamber Structure (VacuumChamberLogic.java:35)§f:
- §bInterior size§f: 5×5×5 to 7×7×7 blocks (so exterior is 7×7×7 to 9×9×9).
- §bHull§f: built from §bVacuum Chamber Casing§f (`QMDBlocks.vacuumChamberCasing`) and §bVacuum Chamber Glass§f (`QMDBlocks.vacuumChamberGlass`). The two are interchangeable in recipes (line 224-225: shapeless conversion between Casing and Glass; adding a §bGlass Block§f to a Casing makes Glass).
- §bBeam Ports§f: §bVacuum Chamber Beam Ports§f (`QMDBlocks.vacuumChamberBeamPort`) connect the chamber to external §bAccelerator Beam Ports§f / beamlines.
- §bCoolant Vents§f: §bVacuum Chamber Vents§f (`QMDBlocks.vacuumChamberVent`) for fluid cooling in/out.
- §bEnergy Ports§f: §bVacuum Chamber Energy Port§f (`QMDBlocks.vacuumChamberEnergyPort`) for RF input.
- §bItem Ports§f: §bVacuum Chamber Port§f (hopper-style item IO).
- §bInternal Coils§f: §bVacuum Chamber Coils§f (`QMDBlocks.vacuumChamberCoil`) placed on the inside walls, used to contain plasma and exotic particles.

§6Casing & Component Recipes (QMDCraftingRecipeHandler.java:223-230)§f:
- §bVacuum Chamber Casing§f (8 per craft): §bO-T-O / S-F-S / O-T-O§f where O=Osmiridium Ingot, T=Tough Alloy Ingot, S=Stainless Steel Ingot, F=Steel Frame
- §bVacuum Chamber Coil§f (2 per craft): §bC-C-C / O-O-O / C-C-C§f where C=BSCCO Wire, O=Osmiridium Ingot
- §bVacuum Chamber Beam Port§f (4): §bO-T-O / B-F-B / O-T-O§f where B=Beamline Pipe
- §bVacuum Chamber Energy Port§f (4): §bO-I-O / T-F-T / O-I-O§f where I=BSCCO Wire
- §bVacuum Chamber Vent§f (4): §bO-I-O / T-F-T / O-T-O§f where I=Servo

§6Contained Machines (recipes at line 219-220)§f:
Two multiblocks are built on top of a Vacuum Chamber hull:
- §bExotic Containment Controller§f (`QMDBlocks.exoticContainmentController`): §bP-E-P / B-F-B / P-E-P§f where P=Elite Plate, E=Extreme Ingot, B=Elite Processor, F=Vacuum Chamber Casing. Used to contain antimatter and exotic particles.
- §bNucleosynthesis Chamber Controller§f (`QMDBlocks.nucleosynthesisChamberController`): §bP-E-P / B-F-B / P-E-P§f where P=Elite Plate, E=Super Alloy Ingot, B=Elite Processor, F=Vacuum Chamber Casing. Used to trigger nucleosynthesis reactions.

§6Containment Safety§f:
Antimatter containment requires uninterruptible power and active cooling. If the multiblock loses power, exceeds its §bMAX_TEMP§f, or has a structural block broken while storing antimatter, the containment field collapses and the antimatter detonates, releasing lethal gamma radiation.

§cWarning§f: A Vacuum Chamber missing a hull block, missing an energy port, missing coolant, or out of thermal range will refuse to form. Connect it to a §bbackup battery bank§f (e.g. §bEnder IO§f or §bRfTools Powercell§f) before activating it with antimatter inside.

§eTip§f: Use the §bShape Card (Silk Quarry)§f from RFTools (`rftools:shape_card:3`) to mass-quarry the §bOsmiridium Ingot§f you need for the casing recipe — Osmiridium is the rare material bottleneck for vacuum chamber construction.
